title: Implement email + password signUp call
description: Wire the signup form submission to Supabase's signUp method, handle errors inline, and redirect to /verify-email on success.
acceptance_criteria: Submitting the form calls supabase.auth.signUp({ email, password, options: { data: { full_name: name } } })
On success: stores email in sessionStorage, redirects to /verify-email?email=[email]
On error: displays the Supabase error message in the #error-msg element
Password validation (min 8 chars, 1 number) runs client-side before the API call
Submit button shows a loading state while the request is in flight

steps.details: if (!/[0-9]/.test(password) || password.length < 8) { showError('Password must be at least 8 characters and contain a number'); return; }
const { error } = await supabase.auth.signUp({ email, password, options: { data: { full_name: name } } }); if (error) { showError(error.message); return; }
Set button textContent to 'Creating account…' and disabled = true before the await. Restore on error.
